testimonials.testimonial: Finally, a stopwatch that's actually made for curling. Not just a regular stopwatch with a curling brand name stuck on it, or put in a different case. Purpose built for curling, it gives you all the features you didn't know you needed, and no complications. It's fantastic!
I hadn't timed rocks with a stopwatch before, but the features on Hog Splitter Pro sounded interesting. Now I can't imagine using anything else! Having the last couple rocks' times is so helpful!

Hog Splitter Pro is a game changer. As a skip I value hog to hog times to feedback hit weights to my team and track the speed of the ice. But with a traditional stopwatch I too often reset it before looking at the time, or I forget the time when my teammate asks. This stopwatch has exactly what I need and nothing else to get in the way. I won’t step onto the ice without my Hog Splitter Pro.
Hog Splitter Pro is the best stopwatch for curling I've ever used. I used to forget to clear my old times and mess up my current timing but now that's a thing of the past!

In gameplay and practice, I have the found Hog Splitter Pro to be unmatched. With its one-button controls and large display, I never miss a split or hog-to-hog time like I would with other stopwatches on the market. Hog Splitter Pro is the only stopwatch choice for competitive curlers.
